name: Tests Generated by Region Decomposition
description: Conformance tests must be generated from the IPL model by region decomposition — each test traceable to a symbolic region of the model — rather than hand-written ad hoc.
rationale: Test Generation & Coverage. Region Decomposition is what turns the model's infinite state space into a finite, exhaustive set of symbolic regions. A test whose lineage does not trace back to a decomposition of a valid model is not grounded in the spec and can silently miss whole regions of behaviour.

examples.fails: ConformanceTest hand-authored with no decomposition of the IPL model in its lineage

source: Imandra Connectivity / IPL — Imandra Protocol Language for formalizing FIX Rules of Engagement (https://www.imandra.ai/connectivity, https://ipl.dev).
